text: Morning Jarvis. What's my agenda for this Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, September 29. No work meetings today. You have Ethan's soccer practice scheduled and gardening in the front walkway.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! I've got the schedule covered. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Screen time is always a negotiation. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. It was a really interesting history episode. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Good way to wrap up the day. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Planning a street block party soon. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've mapped the locations. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. I've indexed the research notes. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Putting together our grocery list. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: I've got the grocery list ready. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, The smart-home hub is acting up today. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Automations are great when they work. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've got the schedule covered. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Good planning. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Setting my fantasy football lineup. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! I've adjusted the local settings. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Played golf with Jake Morrison today. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Neighborhood connections are fun. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Space science and tech is a great focus. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah found a new recipe to try. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Yum, that sounds delicious! I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: The smart-home hub is acting up today. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good call on checking that. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
